steps.title: Identify the two main benefits in the passage
steps.content: Community science has two main benefits stated in the passage: it builds youth confidence in the sciences AND it greatly increases the amount of data that can be collected. The word “also” and phrase “very effective because” show these are both central to why the approach works.

steps.title: Choose the answer that captures both benefits
steps.content:
Choice A directly captures both benefits stated in the passage—increased youth confidence for communities and increased data for researchers.

Choices B and D each negate one stated benefit, contradicting the text, while Choice C narrows to only the example rather than the main idea.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
